title: Oman crude oil price drops by $2.04
summary: This represents a decrease of USD 2.04 from Wednesday’s price of USD 96.93
thbAction: Map the news to THB's provider CRM for referral growth, patient lifecycle engagement, and multi-facility relationship management across hospital and provider networks.
contentHtml:
PHOTO

Muscat – The official price of Oman crude oil for August 2026delivery settled at USD 94.89 per barrel today.

This represents a decrease of USD 2.04 from Wednesday’s price of USD 96.93.

The monthly average price for Oman crude oil for June 2026 delivery stood at USD104.73 per barrel, a decline of USD 19.32 compared to the May 2026 deliveryprice.
